caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie, and over-ear headphones sits at a desk in a recording studio. He is speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. He wears a hoodie with the text "BOSSES TALK" prominently displayed across the chest. Behind him, a white backdrop features a series of gold stars and the repeated word "HUSTLE." A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black equipment box and a mug with the words "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD" printed on it. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing with his right hand and moving his mouth as he speaks, while the camera angle and the studio setting remain static.
